seoTitle: Sardine vs Sarina — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sardine and Sarina. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sardine and Sarina.
heading: Sardine vs Sarina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sardine, Queensland and Sarina, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sardine has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Sarina (26/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sardine or Sarina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sardine has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Sarina scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sardine scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Sarina scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sardine or Sarina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sardine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
